detaileddescription.para: This file contains the definitions for axi timer implementation. MODIFICATION HISTORY:

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 1.0 adk 24/11/21 Initial release. adk 07/02/22 Updated the IntrHandler as per XTimer_SetHandler() API. 1.1 adk 08/08/22 Added doxygen tags.
